sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15015" key="a)rqrwdi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρθρ-ωδία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a particular kind of <sense id="n15015.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">articulation,</tr_> where the surfaces are only slightly concave and convex, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">736</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
